CONTENT.Club career: Belousov made his professional debut for Sheriff Tiraspol in the Moldovan National Division on 24 June 2018, coming on as a 90th-minute substitute in the away match against Zimbru Chișinău, which finished as a 1–0 win.He was loaned out to Dinamo-Auto Tiraspol for the first half of the 2020–21 season. On 5 March 2022, he was loaned out to Sfîntul Gheorghe for the rest of the 2021–22 season. In November 2022, Belousov signed a one-and-a-half-year contract with Bulgarian club Spartak Varna.
CONTENT.External links: Alexandr Belousov at SoccerwayAlexandr Belousov at National-Football-Teams.com
CONTENT.International career: He made his debut for Moldova national football team on 18 November 2020 in a Nations League game against Kosovo. He substituted Dan Spătaru in the 85th minute.

SUMMARY: Alexandr Belousov (born 14 May 1998) is a Moldovan footballer who plays as a defender for Bulgarian club Spartak Varna.
